name: Document Summarizer & Q&A Agent
description: Summarizes any SharePoint or OneDrive document on demand, answers questions about its content, compares document versions, and surfaces related documents. Ask me to summarize a document, answer a question about a policy, or compare two contract versions.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: Summarize the vendor agreement at [SharePoint URL] in 5 bullet points
What are the termination clauses in the contract I just shared?
Compare the Q3 and Q4 versions of the budget proposal
What does section 4.2 of the data processing agreement say about retention?
